category_sources: source_facts.description says q is a tiny command-line DNS client with UDP, TCP, DoT, DoH, DoQ, and ODoH support.
source_facts.executables lists q as the command.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official natesales/q repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository https://github.com/natesales/q, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists DNS protocols UDP, TCP, DoT, DoH, DoQ, and ODoH.
source_facts.executables lists q as a command-line client.
